arts.ttl: BREAKING: Nottingham Forest star Taiwo Awoniyi stretchered off after sickening collision with keeper
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest's FA Cup fourth round tie with Exeter City was marred by an injury suffered by Taiwo Awoniyi, who was stretchered off in extra-time at St James Park

arts.ttl: Exeter City vs Nottingham Forest - Latest score
arts.sum: Keep up to date with all the action from St James Park as Exeter City host Nottingham Forest in the fourth round of the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: Strasbourg fans are all saying the same thing about Nottingham Forest loanee Andrew Omobamidele
Exeter City hoping to create some more Devon FA Cup magic
arts.sum: “A lot of our supporters and a lot of people that will be at the stadium on Tuesday have never seen a fourth round tie with Exeter in it, so from that point of view, it is (history for the club) but for us (staff and players) It’s another stage of the competition where we want to try and win the game,” Caldwell said. After another weekend of shocks and stories being made that will last a lifetime, Exeter City and Nottingham Forest bring the FA Cup fourth round to a close tonight at a sold-out St James Park with manager Gary Caldwell keen to show the world what the Grecians’ story is all about.

arts.ttl: Lewis O'Brien has already done something at Swansea that he never managed at Nottingham Forest

Player says he wants to “make history” at Nottingham Forest – Not thinking about anything else
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest winger Jota Silva has insisted he wants to make history with the club and get into the Champions League. A Bola cover an interview with the winger today from an appearance on YouTube channel Entrelinhas with Afonso Figueiredo.
